tasks.label: build:backend
args: test -x /usr/bin/dotnet || { echo "dotnet SDK is not available in this VS Code context. Reopen the repository in the devcontainer before pressing F5." >&2; exit 1; }; /usr/bin/dotnet build backend/src/WoongBlog.Api/WoongBlog.Api.csproj

tasks.label: compose:baseline
args: test -n "$HOST_PROJECT_PATH" || { echo "HOST_PROJECT_PATH is not set. Reopen the repository in Dev Containers." >&2; exit 1; }; NGINX_DEFAULT_CONF="$HOST_PROJECT_PATH/nginx/default.conf" docker compose up -d --build

tasks.label: compose:https
args: test -n "$HOST_PROJECT_PATH" || { echo "HOST_PROJECT_PATH is not set. Reopen the repository in Dev Containers." >&2; exit 1; }; test -f .local-certs/localhost.pem && test -f .local-certs/localhost-key.pem || { echo "Run ./scripts/setup-local-https.sh on the host before starting HTTPS from the devcontainer." >&2; exit 1; }; docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.https.yml up -d --build

tasks.label: verify:https
args: curl -kfsS https://localhost/api/health && curl -kfsS https://localhost/api/auth/session && PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=https://localhost npx playwright test tests/auth-login.spec.ts tests/public-admin-affordances.spec.ts --workers=1
